instruction: Return ONLY a JSON object with keys responseSummary, positionShift, previousPosition, currentPosition, shiftTriggerIds, references, confidence, openQuestion. The response must cite r1-msg-003 in references and shiftTriggerIds and concede the cleanup freshness risk while preserving the runtime-owned certification boundary.

content.summary: Runtime artifacts plus retained real-host transport must be the source of truth for Codex runtime 009 stress certification.
A projected adapter can appear certified while hiding stale cleanup evidence or a missing stress response unless --require-projection and --require-stress both pass.

Stress the consensus: if the trace was generated before parent cleanup, certification can observe stale pending projection state; disprove by regenerating trace/evidence after clean deletion and retaining raw host transport.

persona.bias: favor runtime-owned evidence over coordinator prose
persona.name: Architect
persona.stakes: A certified adapter must prove projection cleanup and structural stress without overstating substantive quality.

topic: Codex runtime 009 projected stress certification smoke
